title: Hello Blog!
summary: Hey! My name is Greg Stewart, I am a software engineer from Dundee, Scotland. I have decided that I am going to start a blog to document my knowledge and experience as I progress in my career.
content:
Hey! My name is Greg Stewart, I am a software engineer from Dundee, Scotland.

I have decided that I am going to start a blog to document my knowledge and experience as I progress in my career. Through doing this I hope that it pushes me to broaden my skillset and provide a knowledge base across many topics, for myself or anyone that reads.

My main focus will be on .NET technologies and cloud computing as these are part of my everyday work and I have a great interest in them.

Thanks for reading,
Greg Stewart.
